notes: Playing this game right now in alpha! Everything seems to work perfectly! I only ran a couple matches(one as hunter and the other as ghost) and there were no crashes or stutters whatsoever! Sometimes when I alt tabbed, firefox was a bit laggy but only for a couple of seconds and then it returned to normal. FPS counter said i'm gertting around 50-70fps but I noticed no lag in-game. Easy platinum!
title: Midnight Ghost Hunt

notes: I played the game, joining servers and making servers works perfectly, even at max settings the game preforms great, no complaints!
title: Midnight Ghost Hunt

notes:
Tested both Hunter and Ghost tutorials, the main menu UI, and went into a few servers and played a few matches in each. The gameplay overall is excellent with no graphical or audio issues to speak. You can get into matches and play just as you would on Windows.

The main problem I encountered is that I wasn't able to use any in-game text box without the game freezing and crashing. All of them do it, including the text chat and bug reports screen. You also cannot change your server name or enter in a password for passworded sessions as they'll also freeze. There might be a way around this, but until I figure that out and post it here, just try and avoid all text boxes.

Otherwise, while performance wasn't the greatest, I was able to get it smooth and consistent ( 60fps ) on Medium-Low! If you encounter a black screen when first launching the game, be patient. It can take a minute or two the first time you start it up and it didn't give any indication that it was loading when that happened to me.
title: Midnight Ghost Hunt
